svg.title: DCAR appendix queue and totals builder
svg.desc: Builds DCAR appendix reports with grouping and totals (deposits by payment type, cashier detail subtotals, items cashed out tax breakdown subtotals) for a selected day.

g.text: All four appendices feed the DCAR lower
Deposits received — grouped by payment type
✓ Subtotal agrees with DCAR "Deposits Received" line. Click any row to trace back
Add this appendix to DCAR lower section
US amounts shown converted to CAD using the day's exchange rate.
